login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use the email and password from your enrollment.
login.passwordHintStudent: Students: your first password is usually your national ID number (DNI), same as enrollment.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

story.title: Our story
story.body1: Born in 2005 in Riacho He Hé (Formosa), we built a warm, rigorous learning space for every age.
story.body2: We focus on dynamic, playful classes grounded in real-life situations so you use the language with confidence.

modalities.title: On-site & live online
modalities.intro: You can choose the format that fits your routine without giving up the same CEFR-based path, the Ministry of Education of Formosa recognition (Res. 1297/05), and our UTN and Cambridge preparation routes.

presencial.title: On-site classes
presencial.lead: Learn at our campus in Riacho He Hé: guided lessons, steady pacing, and the social energy of a real classroom.
presencial.b1: Small groups with close teacher support and clear speaking practice.
presencial.b2: Printed and digital materials that match each level of the framework.
presencial.b3: Community moments—presentations, screenings, and celebrations—with staff and classmates.

remota.title: Live distance learning
remota.lead: Study from home with 100% live sessions—no passive recordings—with the same objectives and follow-up as on-site courses.
remota.b1: Typically two live meetings per week (60 minutes), with steady instructor guidance.
remota.b2: Reduced groups, guided conversation, and international-standard materials.
remota.b3: Ideal if you want to save travel time while keeping a rigorous rhythm.

alts: Students in an on-site English class, seated at desks with the teacher at the front of the room.
Learners working during a lesson in the institute’s classroom.
Group of children smiling together during an in-person cultural activity at the center.
Students and a teacher celebrating exams with certificates in front of an institute banner.

studentGallery.title: Our students
studentGallery.intro: Tap an album to browse photos from class and celebrations.

levels.title: Study levels
levels.introTrail: : a path from A1 to C2. At C2, the framework describes its ceiling—performance across skills at 100% of the reference.
levels.scaleAria: Visual progression from A1 to C2 along a color band; C2 marks the top of the framework

certs.title: Credentials & pathways
certs.edu: Registered as No. 69 in the non-systemic education registry of the Private Education department. Ministerial Resolution No. 1297/05 Formosa.
certs.utn: You can also pursue national certification through our agreement with UTN Argentina.
certs.cambridge: We prepare students to sit the B2 First Certificate with Cambridge accreditation.
certs.altUtnIngles: English at UTN — National Higher Institute of Technical Teacher Training

import.title: Import students (CSV)
import.hint: Columns supported (Spanish or English headers): nombre/first_name, apellido/last_name, dni or documento, teléfono/phone, email, fecha_nacimiento/birth_date (YYYY-MM-DD), nivel/level (A1–C2), academic_year (default 2026), dni_tutor/tutor_dni, tutor_email, nombre_tutor/apellido_tutor, cuota/monthly_fee (optional). Creates parent account + links when tutor DNI is present. Seeds 12 pending payments for 2026. Password defaults to the student’s DNI (padded to 6 characters if needed).
import.jobLogQueued: Job registered on the server; waiting to start.
import.importModalIntro: This file has {{total}} data rows. Each row is read in order; not every row creates a new login account.
import.importModalExplainBody: “Rows” means lines in your CSV. “New users” counts only new Auth accounts created for students who did not already exist. Existing students may only get profile updates, enrollments, or payments — so new users can be fewer than rows. Skipped rows usually mean no change was needed.
import.importSummaryCountHint: Why the numbers differ: {{processed}} rows in the file → {{createdUsers}} new student logins created, {{profilesUpdated}} profiles updated, {{skippedNoop}} rows skipped (no change needed).
import.noRows: No valid rows found. Check headers and required fields.
import.invalidCsvPayload: The import payload is invalid or incomplete. Download a fresh template and try again.
import.parseEmptyWorkbook: The spreadsheet has no sheets to read.
import.parseExcelFailed: Could not read the Excel file. Try CSV or another file.
import.parseCsvFailed: The CSV file could not be parsed.
import.rowResultEmailDniMismatch: The email and national ID belong to different users.
import.rowResultNoUserId: No user id was returned for this row.
import.rowResultProfileMissing: Student profile was not found after creation.
import.rowResultExistingNonStudent: That account already exists with a role other than student.
import.rowResultEmailDniConflict: That email is already registered with a different national ID.
import.rowResultAuthError: Could not create or look up the account for this row.
import.rowResultProfileUpdateFailed: Could not update the student profile.
import.rowResultEnrollmentFailed: Could not add the course enrollment.

messages.title: Messages
messages.lead: Admins can message anyone. Your inbox only shows messages from teachers and other admins (students cannot message admins). Use the tabs to filter. Teachers reply to students from the teacher account.
messages.recipientSearchPlaceholder: Type a name to find a user
messages.recipientListEmpty: No other users are available to message. Add accounts in Users or check your access.

home.title: Admin dashboard
home.lead: Here's what needs your attention today.

cards.import: Bulk student onboarding from a CSV file.
cards.users: Create accounts, assign roles, and bulk CSV import (Import CSV tab).
cards.payments: Approve or reject receipts uploaded by guardians.
cards.registrations: Leads from the public enrollment form.

settings.title: Settings
settings.inscriptionsHint: When off, the enrollment button is hidden from the landing page.

analytics.title: Analytics & usage
analytics.lead: Aggregated events (no identifiable personal data in metadata). Time zone: Argentina. Traffic includes guests and bots (User-Agent); signed-in users also emit product events separately.
analytics.trafficHint: Last 30 days: every page load under a locale path. Bots are detected from User-Agent; guests have no session.
analytics.chartWorldMapHint: Last 30 days: page hits with country from edge headers (traffic_page_hits). Darker = more hits vs. the busiest country in this period.
analytics.chartWorldMapLegend: Intensity is relative to the top country in the range (not absolute population).
analytics.worldMapError: Could not load the map outline. Check your connection or try again later.
analytics.chartFunnelHint: Last 7 days: page_view events with the section: prefix (e.g. payments, messages).
analytics.chartGeoHint: From edge headers (e.g. Vercel); may show “unknown”.

users.noFilterResults: No rows match the current filter.
users.confirmDeleteCascade: This cannot be undone. Deleting the account also removes linked data: payments, course enrollments, attendance, parent–student links, and any other information tied to that user in the database.
users.confirmDeleteIntro: You are about to delete {{count}} account(s).
users.deletePartial: Some accounts were deleted; at least one deletion failed. You can retry.
users.selfProtected: You cannot delete your own account here.
users.title: Add user
users.lead: Create portal accounts. Password and role can be set now or later (default role: student; if password is empty, a secure one is generated).
users.passwordHint: Optional. Leave empty to generate a secure password.
users.errCreateForbidden: You are not allowed to do this.
users.errCreatePassword: Password must be at least 6 characters or left empty.
users.errCreateAuth: Could not create the account. Try again.
users.errCreateNoUser: No user account was created. Try again.
users.errCreateNotFound: That enrollment request was not found.
users.errDeleteForbidden: You are not allowed to do this.
users.errDeleteAllFailed: None of the selected accounts could be deleted.
users.detailLead: Portal account details and profile photo when available.

payments.title: Payment review
payments.lead: Approve or reject receipts uploaded by parents.

billing.title: Student billing
billing.lead: Scholarships, exemptions, and all payment periods for
billing.scholarshipLead: Percentage off the listed fee for months in the range. Leave “until” empty for no end date.
billing.exemptionLead: Exempt months do not require payment. You cannot exempt an already approved period.
billing.enrollmentFeeLead: One-time enrollment fee exemption. The authorizing admin is recorded in the audit log.

promotions.title: Promotions & enrollment
promotions.lead: Discount codes for enrollment fee, monthly fees, or both. Usage is counted automatically.
promotions.confirmRetire: Retire this promotion? This cannot be undone from this screen.
promotions.invalidMonthlyMonths: Enter a valid number of months (0 or more).

coupons.title: Discount coupons
coupons.lead: Create codes with a validity window or no end date. Deactivate codes you no longer want accepted.

registrations.title: Web registrations
registrations.lead: Prospective students from the public form.
registrations.filterPlaceholder: Name, email, ID, phone, level, status…
registrations.noFilterResults: No rows match the current filter.
registrations.name: Name
registrations.acceptLead: A portal user will be created with the student role. Set an initial password or leave it blank to generate one.
registrations.acceptLeadMinor: For students under the legal age of majority, a parent/guardian account is created from the tutor data on the request (when present) and linked. The guardian can update the student's profile from their family dashboard.
registrations.acceptMinorHint: This birth date is treated as a minor. A tutor ID on the request is required to create and link the guardian account.
registrations.errBirthDateRequired: A valid birth date (YYYY-MM-DD) is required to enroll.
registrations.errMinorRequiresTutorDni: Minors must include a tutor ID on the enrollment request. Fix the record or ask the family to resubmit.
registrations.errTutorDniSameAsStudent: Tutor ID cannot be the same as the student's ID.
registrations.errTutorDniInUseByStudent: That tutor ID already belongs to a student account. Use another guardian or contact support.
registrations.errNoCourseForLevel: There is no online course for that level and academic year. Create the course or fix the level on the request.
registrations.errEnrollmentFailed: The student could not be enrolled in the course. Retry or check the database.
registrations.errRollbackFailed: Enrollment failed and the newly created student account could not be removed. Contact support with the request ID.
registrations.errSaveFailed: The enrollment could not be finalized. Try again or contact support.
registrations.errTutorLinkFailed: The student account was created but the guardian could not be linked. Support may need to fix the link.
registrations.editLead: Editing is only available while the status is "New".
registrations.editLevelHint: CEFR level (A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2). Leave empty if not set yet.

register.title: Enrollment request
register.lead: Tell us about you. Our team will contact you.
register.birthDateHint: We use it to calculate age when the account is created.
register.success: Thank you! We received your request.
register.closed: Enrollment is closed at the moment.
register.validationError: Check the form fields and try again.

myProfile.title: My profile
myProfile.lead: Update your personal details, password, and profile photo. Your login email cannot be changed here; contact support if you need a new email.
myProfile.personalDetailsLead: These fields are visible to staff according to your role.
myProfile.profileMissingBody: You are authenticated, but we could not load your profile row yet. Please sign out and try again. If it persists, contact the institute so they can complete your account setup.
myProfile.emailHint: Read-only. To change it, contact the institute.
myProfile.personalErrorMinor: Linked minors cannot change these details themselves. Ask your guardian or the institute.
myProfile.personalErrorDni: That ID or passport number is already used by another account.
myProfile.personalErrorGeneric: We could not save your details. Try again.
myProfile.personalErrorValidation: Check the fields and try again.
myProfile.minorNotice: Your guardian manages your name, phone, date of birth, and ID through the institute. You can still change your password and photo.
myProfile.passwordSectionLead: Enter your current password, then choose a new one (at least 8 characters).
myProfile.passwordWeak: New password must be at least 8 characters.
myProfile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
myProfile.passwordGeneric: We could not update the password. Try again.
myProfile.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 2 MB.
myProfile.avatarForbidden: You do not have permission for this action

student.title: My progress
student.engagementHint: Points for exploring materials and using the portal (capped at 100 for display).
student.streakHint: Mandatory classes present in a row (most recent first).
student.paymentsLead: Upload a receipt for a pending month. You can review past submissions below.
student.tutorManagesPayments: This section is managed by your guardian
student.promoLead: If you have a code, enter it to register the benefit on your account.
student.messagesLead: Write to your assigned teacher. You can delete a message until it has been answered.
student.messagesNoTeacher: You do not have an assigned teacher yet. Ask an administrator to assign one.
student.profileLead: Upload your photo here after you sign in. Photos are not accepted on the public enrollment request form.
student.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 2 MB.
student.avatarForbidden: You do not have permission for this action

parent.title: Family dashboard
parent.paymentsLead: Upload a transfer receipt to a pending month.
parent.promoLead: Enter a code for the selected student.
parent.messagesLead: Write to teachers assigned to your linked students. You can only message those teachers.
parent.messagesRecipientSearchPlaceholder: Type a name to find a teacher
parent.messagesRecipientListEmpty: No assigned teachers are available yet.
parent.messagesNoTeachers: No teachers are assigned to your linked students yet.
parent.profileLead: Upload your photo here after you sign in. Photos are not accepted on the public enrollment request form.
parent.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 2 MB.
parent.avatarForbidden: You do not have permission for this action
parent.editChildLead: Update the student's name, phone, date of birth and login email.
parent.wardInvalidForm: Check the student's details and try again.
parent.wardAuthLookupFailed: We could not load this student's account. Try again later.
parent.wardEmailTaken: That email is already used by another account.
parent.wardForbidden: You do not have access to this student

teacher.title: Teacher area
teacher.lead: Attendance and class tools will appear here.
teacher.messagesLead: Message students, guardians, teachers, or admins. Reply to students and guardians below; each reply is a new message.
teacher.messagesRecipientSearchPlaceholder: Type a name to find a user
teacher.messagesRecipientListEmpty: No other users are available to message. Add accounts in Users or check your access.
